title: chore(deps): update dependency metalsmith-sass to v1.5.1
body:
This Pull Request updates dependency [metalsmith-sass](https://github.com/stevenschobert/metalsmith-sass) from `v1.4.0` to `v1.5.1`

**Note**: This PR was created on a configured schedule ("every weekend" in timezone `Europe/Paris`) and will not receive updates outside those times.


<details>
<summary>Release Notes</summary>

### [`v1.5.0`](https://github.com/stevenschobert/metalsmith-sass/releases/v1.5.0)

- Updated to [node-sass v4.7](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/releases/tag/v4.7.0). Thanks @​reyawn! #​43  :tada:

---

### [`v1.5.1`](https://github.com/stevenschobert/metalsmith-sass/releases/v1.5.1)

- Fixes a bug with imports when using absolute paths in Metalsmith's source option. #​45 (Thanks @​RetrocadeNet) 🎉

---

</details>


<details>
<summary>Commits</summary>

#### v1.5.0
-   [`82af655`](https://github.com/stevenschobert/metalsmith-sass/commit/82af655c2c22b2e47d6eaf3e18327810778b2e52) bump to node-sass 4.7.2
-   [`f04ff3a`](https://github.com/stevenschobert/metalsmith-sass/commit/f04ff3a47932a8d83b7a50e20f939987d04edb8c) bump to async 2.6.0
-   [`71af246`](https://github.com/stevenschobert/metalsmith-sass/commit/71af24604691e9318b219f0428ebd7248fe7207d) Merge pull request #​43 from reyawn/bump-dependencies
-   [`7eb40c0`](https://github.com/stevenschobert/metalsmith-sass/commit/7eb40c017bd2b6a088d8d3d21746c54964bcbd48) update travis node versions
-   [`447db46`](https://github.com/stevenschobert/metalsmith-sass/commit/447db465639d7a770c33e4112e0c39a9df458b06) bump version, v1.5.0
#### v1.5.1
-   [`b83133b`](https://github.com/stevenschobert/metalsmith-sass/commit/b83133b1c5d9fc331009e9eb0a3fcd2ee233fee5) #​44 - Added a support for metalsmith source path being absolute
-   [`9e0fae5`](https://github.com/stevenschobert/metalsmith-sass/commit/9e0fae5723d144d036fb9fbbebddbb8a62890fd4) #​44 - Added a test case covering support for absolute source path & imports
-   [`c92165c`](https://github.com/stevenschobert/metalsmith-sass/commit/c92165cbaee411013db4bba5becc42343c1153e5) Merge pull request #​45 from RetrocadeNet/issue-44-support-absolute-content-path
-   [`3e4749b`](https://github.com/stevenschobert/metalsmith-sass/commit/3e4749b0801350c24ff7c539a7ceba98671994db) bump version, v1.5.1
